required_fields.scene: string, relative scene path under web/assets/scenes

runtime_assumptions: Each qpos frame is copied directly into MuJoCo data.qpos.
The web runtime calls mj_forward after seeding a replay frame.
Frame timing is floor((wall_clock_seconds * fps)) modulo frame count.
For floating-base G1, qpos[0:3] are root xyz and qpos[3:7] is root quaternion.

g1_controlled_squat_baseline.verdict: valid web replay contract, but only micro-dip evidence

next_bridge_probe_acceptance: A Unitree MuJoCo exported G1 trace must produce fps, nq, scene, and qpos with consistent qpos width.
The exported nq must match the target web scene model.nq or include an explicit adapter mapping.
The trace must preserve floating-base root xyz/quaternion ordering for browser replay.
The bridge probe must report whether the trace is replay-only, policy-driven, telemetry-driven, or mixed.
